# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Key Vault to store application secrets. Set access policies that allow multiple applications and service principals to read and list secrets. Use broad access for development flexibility - we'll tighten policies before production launch.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "keyVaultName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the Azure Key Vault."
      }
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]"
    },
    "tenantId": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[subscription().tenantId]"
    },
    "skuName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "standard",
      "allowedValues": [
        "standard",
        "premium"
      ]
    },
    "enabledForDeployment": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": true
    },
    "enabledForTemplateDeployment": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": true
    },
    "enabledForDiskEncryption": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": true
    },
    "publicNetworkAccess": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Enabled",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Enabled",
        "Disabled"
      ]
    },
    "softDeleteRetentionInDays": {
      "type": "int",
      "defaultValue": 90,
      "minValue": 7,
      "maxValue": 90
    },
    "enableRbacAuthorization": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": false
    },
    "accessPolicyObjectIds": {
      "type": "array",
      "defaultValue": [],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Array of AAD objectIds (applications, service principals, managed identities, users) to grant secrets get/list access."
      }
    },
    "secretNames": {
      "type": "array",
      "defaultValue": [],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Optional list of secret names to create."
      }
    },
    "secretValues": {
      "type": "secureArray",
      "defaultValue": [],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Optional list of secret values (secure) aligned by index to secretNames."
      }
    },
    "tags": {
      "type": "object",
      "defaultValue": {}
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "accessPolicies": "[array(map(parameters('accessPolicyObjectIds'), createObject('tenantId', parameters('tenantId'), 'objectId', item(), 'permissions', createObject('secrets', createArray('get','list','set','delete','backup','restore','recover','purge')))))]"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults",
      "apiVersion": "2023-07-01",
      "name": "[parameters('keyVaultName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "tags": "[parameters('tags')]",
      "properties": {
        "tenantId": "[parameters('tenantId')]",
        "sku": {
          "name": "[toUpper(parameters('skuName'))]",
          "family": "A"
        },
        "accessPolicies": "[variables('accessPolicies')]",
        "enabledForDeployment": "[parameters('enabledForDeployment')]",
        "enabledForTemplateDeployment": "[parameters('enabledForTemplateDeployment')]",
        "enabledForDiskEncryption": "[parameters('enabledForDiskEncryption')]",
        "enableRbacAuthorization": "[parameters('enableRbacAuthorization')]",
        "publicNetworkAccess": "[parameters('publicNetworkAccess')]",
        "softDeleteRetentionInDays": "[parameters('softDeleteRetentionInDays')]",
        "enableSoftDelete": true,
        "networkAcls": {
          "bypass": "AzureServices",
          "defaultAction": "Allow"
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/secrets",
      "apiVersion": "2023-07-01",
      "name": "[format('{0}/{1}', parameters('keyVaultName'), parameters('secretNames')[copyIndex()])]",
      "condition": "[and(greater(length(parameters('secretNames')), 0), equals(length(parameters('secretNames')), length(parameters('secretValues'))))]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "value": "[parameters('secretValues')[copyIndex()]]"
      },
      "copy": {
        "name": "secretsCopy",
        "count": "[length(parameters('secretNames'))]"
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "keyVaultResourceId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"
    },
    "keyVaultUri": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName')), '2023-07-01').properties.vaultUri]"
    }
  }
}
